title: rubus × biturigensis
intro: Rubus × biturigensis, also known as the Black Raspberry or Black Raspberry Bramble, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between the American Black Raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the European Black Raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × biturigensis include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, certain cancers, and cognitive decline, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Rubus × biturigensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and supplements, as well as used fresh in jams, jellies, and other culinary applications.
